goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'south'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'tuesday'.
If the booking fails how about '3 nights'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should 'leave after 10:15'.
The train should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the south
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 4 nights starting from tuesday
If the booking fails how about 3 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should leave after 10:15
The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
